title: Guilty pleasure
text: Barbacoa is my guilty pleasure. If i could have it every day, I would. This brand, in my opinion, is the best, comparable to a homemade one. I sometimes add onions, mushrooms, and carrots... a perfect dinner with a salad, tortillas , or rice. But you dont need to add anything, its delicious.

EVERYTHING SEEMED WELL PUT TOGETHER BUT I HAS ALOT ON MEAT THAT WASN'T MEAT. IT WAS CHOPPED UP FAT. NOT WHAT I WAS LOOKING FOR IN THIS MEAL. IT SORTA OUT WEIGHED THE MEAT. MORE FAT AND LESS MEAT. YUCK. BUT THE MEAT WE DID FIND WAS VERY TENDER AND THE GRAVY WAS VERY GOOD. MAYBE A PINCH OR TWO TOO MUCH SALT FOR MY TASTES.

This is a traditional tasty beef barbacoa that is perfect for lunch or dinner, served with pinto and jalapeño beans, warmed corn or flour tortillas and garnished with chopped white onions, scallions, cilantro and slices of radishes.

I love beef tips and rice so I bought this to cut down on time preparing and bought some boiling bag rice and just poured the beef onto the rice after it was heated quick meal just add a salad or slaw or green beans whatever you choose as a side and you have a meal in minutes

It was very decent. I really like the flavor, thou the texture was a bit much for this austitic palete. Overall, I think their better beef products that are easier to cook and have better texture, but I believe if you already like shredded beef, it a winner. But I still say it 4 stars, I don't regret buying it, it was a great experince. I just have better ones with different styles of precooked beef.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: This product is fatty and grizzly.ł
text: I use it often for dinner but no more.would not recommend.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: It is delicious.
text: I love it ! The gravy is fabulous over rice or mashed potatoes. Taste like I cooked for hours!

title: It's great
text: Been getting this and the Italian version for years. Simple, fast, tastes great. I haven't noticed any decline in quality like others have been saying. Add a little butter and potatoes, delicious.

Del Real Foods Slow-Cooked Beef Birria is a quick, easy and convenient way to please a crowd who are looking to have a fiesta night Its really delicious in tacos, burritos, quesadillas also you can lay some on a bed of nacho chips with cheese and veggies Yum Yum if your creative sure there are many other ways to use this beef Not to spicy and the price will s reasonable for the convenience of it Always buy when I am strapped with time when having lil get togethers and taco night!!!

title: 1 small chunk of gross meat!
text: Received one small chunk of gross meat and a bag of liquid. I am very disappointed with the portion size of meat in this bag. The small piece had a big tendon in it and it was hard! I was grossed out and threw it away. will not order this ever again! total rip off for 11 dollars!

title: Yummy!
text: Very good! Kind-of taste like the roast my Mom used to make. I just wish it hadn't gone up so much in price. My husband likes this over very fine vermicelli noodles or mashed potatoes. I keep this on hand every few weeks for quick meals vs. heating a frozen meal.

title: Thin Sauce, Barely Any Meat — Very Disappointing
text: This was my first time ever trying barbacoa and I was really disappointed. The tub says 15 oz, but there's maybe 5 ounces of actual beef in it — the rest is a thin, watery red sauce. The meat was bland, not spicy at all, and the liquid was so runny you couldn't even make a sandwich without the bread turning soggy. For $10.98, I expected a lot more meat and a lot better flavor. Definitely not worth the price.

title: You need an upgrade
text: I have purchased your products for years and the quality is really going downhill. I was really disappointed with my last 2 purchases due to the excessive fat, slimy fat and grisly hard fat balls. This is items which should be removed from your product by your line inspectors or Food Safety Inspectors because these globs are gross.

Out of "one pound" of brisket, over 75% was just pure fat. We got *maybe* 3 ounces of usable meat, the rest went to the dog. Very disappointing for a fairly pricey product. Pre-packaged deli meat would have been a better choice than this. Will NEVER buy again.

Might be the worst meat we've ever eaten. Way too salty, with stringy fatty pieces of gristle along with the “meat”. I'm no expert, but I think this occupies the space below canning grade. I wish I could rate this zero stars, because one star is too generous.

Excellent flavor, $10.00 for 2 servings. .Barbacoa is soupy by design. By measurement there was 1 cup of liquid and a scant cup of meat including the fat covering which adds flavor but which we dont eat. Youll need to add starch to stretch this for two, like chochoyotes (what ever your family calls masa dumplings) or rice or beans, even potatos in a pinch. Have used this as a base for max 4 people in rice bowls if your very generous with rice and beans and corn and everything else plus condiments but 3 would be the preferred no. Of rice bowls

title: Lots of fat and gristle
text: We have bought this product before and enjoyed it. This time, however, there were several pieces of fat and gristle. Definitely did not live up to expectations.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Absolutely terrible
text: Been buying this product off and on for years. I don't know what you did, but it's literally inedible now and I'll never purchase again. It was full of fat and gristle. I ate less than 10% of it. Just pull this off the shelf instead of selling us a garbage product.

title: Yummy %26 Great Source of Protein
text: It's just a little pricey, but it tastes great and really helps me out on my diet since im trying to eat as much protein as possible. It helps me stick to my diet, cook less, and is super yummy. Only thing that would make it better is it to be a few dollars cheaper. Also, its really tender.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: No fit for humans
text: I have purchased before and enjoyed this, but this last package was almost inedible. Of the 15 ounces almost 3 consisted of slimy globs of fat and one large 2 inch square x 1 inch thick of hard solid gristle. The weight of this was almost 3 ounces. That's 1/5th of the product. The price has consistently increased and I paid almost $12 for this.

title: Just not good anymore
text: While it has more flavor than their thinly sliced steak (I gave that one star), the quality is just not good. It doesn't come in slices; it is just misshapen chunks. And also, kind of tough to chew. I used to buy this brand years ago and it was good. Not anymore.

title: So misleading
text: I did everything the directions say and my picture say it all. So underwhelming. Nothing like the picture. Mostly all gravey. Never again

I have purchased this product several times before. It is, or was one of my favorite meats to use in salads. The last 3 times I purchased it, it has not been the product I previously loved. The meat is very tough to chew, and there are a lot of gristle pieces that has to be discarded because it's hard to chew and swallow. If my dog is eating 3/4 of this meat and I'm barely eating 1/3 of it; it's not worth buying.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Love, but way too expensive now!
text: This is one of my favorites that I put over buttered elbow macaroni. It is delicious. Unfortunately, I will no longer buying this product at that price. Used to be near six dollars now near 12!

title: Worth the buy
text: Great taste! Nicely seasoned. The consistency of the seasoning was great. The meat fried well and was not too tough. A few pieces were not cut evenly into strips, but that was not a problem. The strips were long, wide enough, and not too short. I ended up cutting some of the strips in half because some family members preferred shorter pieces of meat in their fajita. Goes great in a fajita or even in a salad.

My palate did not connect w/this item plus, too little amount f/the price. Tasted nothing like any babacoa I've ever eaten anywhere. I'd @the samex recommend it as this is my personal review %26 other's will have opposite opinions thus, my review shouldn't sway any1's desire to try this or any other item I may not agree with.

title: NOT typical barbacoa at all but it is tasty
text: This is not like regular barbacoa, it's not oily and full of fat flavor, it's in a tomatoey Mexican spiced sauce, the texture is more like shredded roast or shredded beef, not soft like true barbacoa, very disappointed in that, when You're expecting barbacoa it's not..... however it did taste good in tacos and I also made a shredded beef enchilada casserole with it as a test in the flavors are good it's just not your typical barbacoa so don't expect that.

I have purchased this many times and it has always been delicious. I had served it to guests and they purchased it after eating it at my house. It is best to pick out your own package. Some packages have more fat than others. I prefer less fat and like to pick out which package best suits me. My last order was a pickup order and I got a package with a lot of fat. It tasted good but just too much for me. This is a quick easy meal. We typically heat it and put it on buns with bbq sauce. It makes several sandwiches.

title: What was that awful thing?!?
text: I found a golf ball size piece of gristle or what seemed even harder. Cloaked in gravy it looked like any other piece of meat but it was hard yellowish and ugly. Along with that were three chunks by of total fat!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Very disapointing product
text: I bought 2 packages and was going to put this over mashed potatoes for dinner. The meat was completely inedible. All grissel and cartledge. For the price I could have bought steaks.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Quality Going Down
text: I've bought this product well over a year now. The last several I've bought is full of fat. Most of the product has to be thrown out.

title: Great!
text: Tasty, tender, and very lean meat. I served it with baked beans, potato salad, and sauteed yellow squash. The strip of meat in the bottom of the photo is Jack Daniel's brand brisket. The short piece above it to the left of the squash is a piece of another brand. I bought two brands to see which one we liked best, and Jack Daniel's brand won the test. I didn't have to cut off any fat from it.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
text: I won't normally even try things like this but for some reason, I read reviews. Everyone loved it. I decided to take a chance. I was not disappointed. The roast was melt in your mouth good with great flavor and natural texture. You could do your own roast at home and it wouldn't be any better. 10/10

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
text: The taste is very good. I use it as I would a pot roast that I would cook. I bake carrots, potatoes,red onion, a little celery and it makes a delicious meal. Add brown and serve rolls with spreadable butter and a nice dessert. Take a walk with the family after dinner. Give the kids a bath and put them to bed. Spend the rest of the evening sipping a glass of fine wine with your honey bunny.

very good. Expensive for the amount you get, then again in today's world not surprising. These are great just to quickly heat up and pop them in a tortilla shell. Sauce taste good. Again, for the price you need a little bit more beef in that package.

title: There's not a lot of beef tips for the price.
text: I found a recipe with rice and, mushrooms and beef. The recipe called for Hormel beef tips and gravy. It was almost $12 for the package. When I opened it up and took off the plastic seal, there wasn't a lot of beef in it, mostly gravy. I hope every package isn't like this. I have a screenshot if Hormel needs to see it. I'm disappointed with this product.

title: good product easy to prep
text: Easy to eat for olders. Easy prep. tasted really good. picked 1 up. later ordered 2 pickup. one looked great other looked pale. so would advise going into store for this so you see what your getting. i like the pink cooked ones not the the pale looking one.

title: We will be repeat buyers of Beef Tips and Gravy - 15 oz !
text: I couldn't believe how easy this was to prepare! It's quick and doesn't involve numerous steps. I was wary about my husband liking it. He had seen the box and kept hedging away from having it for dinner. It was great! We ate it along with some green beans and a salad. Very tasty, very tender. I have dental issues so I can't eat tough beef. Thoroughly enjoyable!

title: Tastes great! Okay price.
text: Tastes great! I only wish there was more meat in the package, but no complaints on flavor. It's a shame the local walmarts don't carry more Del Real products. I've liked most that I've tried, especially the Mexican Rice. Kroger has stopped carrying their products altogether. As long as my nearby Walmarts keep carrying the Del Real Beef Birria, I'll keep buying it.

title: Delicious beef tips and gravy for dinner or lunch
text: These beef tips and gravy are absolutely delicious. I serve them over microwavable white rice. But you can put them over mashed potatoes as well. I can not pull the plastic back to open them once they are done. So I take a pair of scissors and cut the clear plastic that covers the top. These are perfect for the elderly and or disabled or a single person trying to eat healthier well balanced meals. Open a can of green beans or make a salad to go on the side and you have a balanced meal. You can make 3 to 4 meals off of one container. More like 3 meals if you are a big eater. The gravy is delicious as well. And the meat just melts in your mouth, it is so tender.

title: I didn't believe it either
text: I was pleaseasantly surprised by the taste and quality. this is my second bag. coating is consistent and tasty. the meat itself holds its own against "premium" products. I have found slices are well made with only a very small percentage NOT being with the grain so the strips are consistent in chewability. no gristle, no fat chunks, and the lack of a consistent size shows it is cut from normal material and not formed, textured meat. bottom line... quick meal. tasty. quality. reliable.

title: Best brisket meat I have ever had
text: Good quality meat that goes good by itself, in a salad, or on a sandwich. Unlike other microwaveable meats, this cooks with fresh savory, restaurant quality meat in only 2-3 minutes. It's no wonder that Wal-mart sells out of it all the time. The price is a little high but for 15 ounces of meat that is not too bad and cheaper than most other briskets

Great flavor! We have stopped getting street food/food truck meals as prices are just getting crazy, especially on meat. My daughter loves Birria and she has been missing it, so wanted to try it as an occasional treat. It's definitely really good and the best store bought we have tried. The price is very reasonable based on market prices and the quality is good.

title: The dog wouldn’t touch it either.
text: The whole meal tasted like plastic. Followed directions exactly. It’s a shame, I loved the shredded pork. This tasted like we’d expect a Temu brisket to. For a premium price point and brand name, I expect a lot more. This was inedible. We couldn’t even get the dog to eat it.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I do not plan to purchase this product again.
text: We used it as a stirfry over rice. The broth that came with it was very tasty. However, the beef was almost impossible to chew. It was so tough. In fact, almost half of the meat was discarded.

It's not my backyard brisket but being from Texas it's pretty good for store bought . it's thinly sliced and will easily get you at least seven meat loaded sandwiches . I recommend trying it for a quick brisket sandwich fix or whatever your pallet desires . I've bought this numerous times . I will buy again .

title: Take out the fat chunks please
text: I love your beef tips and gravy. However, in the last six months, I've had at least three packages that have big hunks of fat in them. You used to never have fat in them. Please go back to that. I don't like the fat.

title: For any occasion...
text: It was a nice and delicious supplement to our Xmas table. Tastes great, and fits as a main or side dish. And as leftovers are a great item for making a sandwich for the family, children, or if you travel. I definitely will buy it again, and highly recommend it to everyone who likes that kind of food. Enjoy!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: It only takes one package to ruin experience.
text: My daughter loves this product and it was staple item for a quick lunch or dinner, while at work. Unfortunately the last package was so dry and salty she couldn't eat it. Makes her nervous to try again.

title: Small but delicious
text: The flavor is fine… not as good as the fresh birria from the taco truck, but it's great to have it ready for a quick meal. It was easy to prepare.. just microwave and drain the broth into a separate dish for dipping tacos. The serving sizes are small - not a value purchase but it was fine for just the two of us. My protein bowl included a chopped salad mix, Fritos, avocado, olives, crème and tomatoes and black beans. Deliciousness!

It's almost cheaper and easier to make it yourself. I could bet you the one you made would have more flavor too. There was barely any meat in there and it was so thin and kind of bland. I would pass on this next time. Just make it yourself and you'll get more.

title: Not that great seasoned meat
text: The bag says family size, well sure if you're a family of two only or only have a couple of chunks of meat per person only...There were only two semi long pieces of meat, the rest are just some various sized pieces.....I just wanted a quick snack so I didn't make fajita sides. The meat is salty, chewy and definitely needed to floss afterward... There's no char flavor at all, fajitas normally have a char- grilled flavor and no brown on the meat either until I put in the hot skillet for a bit....... I don't think I'll try it again, not worth the $14.95, I think I could've gotten a fajita plate at a restaurant with more meat for the same price plus sides..... here I was trying to save money by not eating out.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: No longer affordable. Great product, but too high
text: Several months ago, I'd have suggested that you try this. It tastes great and it's easy to prepare. However, the price has doubled and it is not worth it at that price. I'm extremely disappointed in Walmart for the huge price markup. I'd have understood some increase, but to have all of these products go up to nearly $12 overnight reduces the value of the product to nearly nothing.

title: Quick and easy meal
text: I got this for a quick and easy meal. It did not disappoint. The meat was tender and no fatty pieces. . The gravy was perfectly thickened. It was definitely easy, quick, and delicious. Dinner was served with Sister Shubert's rolls within minutes. . I will definitely buy it again. I highly recommend this entree.

title: Do not waste your time!
text: $10.98 for the smallest piece of meat I have ever seen! This is a rip off! Please do not waste your time nor your money on this product. It's not enough in the package to fill one taco/tortilla shell. The meat is barley seasoned. You're paying for a bag full of the liquid the meat was cooked in. This is horrible!

Since I no longer cook from scratch. i found these beef tips to be very tender and tasty. Perfect for two servings over rice or noodles. i like to add a touch of soy sauce for added flavor, but i don't advice it if you are watching your salt intake. definitely worth buying.

title: Good tasting, but way overpriced
text: The product itself is great! Goes well with mashed potatoes or egg noodles. Has gotten WAY overpriced based on shrinkage (used to be 16oz) and less meat than before.

While it's not homemade or restaurant quality, it is still pretty flavorful. I saw no fat or gristle, nothing off-putting or objectionable about the texture. It could have been a little spicier. The portion was small, but certainly enough for one person. It made enough for four small corn tortillas. Lots of juice/gravy for dipping. As an alternative to the tortillas, you could serve it over rice, pasta, ramen, potatoes/tater tots, or even chips for nachos. It has many uses.

title: THE PRICES WILL COME DOWN IS WE STOP BUYING THEM!!
text: It Wasnt But A Few Months Ago And Te Price For This Item was $8.47 Now It Almost $12 The Value Just Isn't There Any Longer ITS TOO FRESH IN. MY MIND The. I Could Go Out And Eat A Steak and Salad For $14 Or Grab And ENTIRE ROAST for $14. These Prices Have GOT TO CME DOWN andI Its NEVER GOING TO HAPPEN UNLESS WE ABSOLUTELY REFUSE TO PAY IT!!! If They Cant Sell Them? THE PRICE WILL GO DOWN!!!

title: Hard pass
text: For starters, calling 14oz of meat a “family pack” is WILD. But more importantly, this meat quite literally tastes like dog food. I took one bite and immediately spit it out. I don’t typically do reviews but I had to warn other potential buyers not to make the same mistake I did. 0/10

title: Convenient Restaurant style at home
text: The Del Real Birria that is available in the prepared foods section is such an easy dinner when you're up for a savory and spicy meal that is quick and convenient! The meat has a lot of stock with it so it won't dry out and makes for an amazing taco night! The whole meal is microwaveable making it so easy to prepare.

title: What exactly is this??
text: OK, so I know it says Beef Tips", soooo it's from a cow...I can only guess that the "tips" are the scraps cut off more desirable cuts. You know, the fatty, gristly, questionable bits. Awful!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
text: Portions of the entire package would only feed two adults. So, for every additional adult eating, expect to buy more than one, which would be an expensive meal. And going back for seconds, you can forget that unless you buy more. It was too expensive. Overall, it has great taste and is very tender just costly.

Love these Hormel meals! They're great to keep on hand for a quick dinner. I've served this over rice, egg noodles or mashed potatoes. Add a vegetable or a salad and you have a great meal ready to serve in no time. I had unexpected visitors who were impressed with my effortless dinner.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Quick and Easy Dinner
text: As other reviews indicate, preparing the beef over mashed potatoes makes a quick, stress free dinner. This serves two adults, therefore a little costly if needing to buy two packages for a family of 4. Overall, for my busy days, I would recommend for its convenience and good taste.

I love roast beef and gravy but there is not always time to make that. This is my go to and I am so happy I found this. It is very tender roasted beef in beef gravy and so close to homemade that it is hard to tell the difference. I am not a big fan of processed food but this is really good.

title: Simply irresistible
text: Bought this on a chance and I was not disappointed, I did add some olive oil and more seasoning, wrapped it in foil and put it in the oven until I smelled the aroma of smoke, and my family devoured it all. I may have gotten a few bites 🤣. Told my coworker about it and she has been hooked ever since. I have to keep at least 2 packs in my freezer.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Must try. Soooo goood!
text: I did not exactly follow their preparation guidelines. instead I fried up some mushrooms in butter and then added the meat and juices to the saucepan along with the mushrooms and cooked until hot (just a few minutes). it is the best combination in the world and it makes the meal so good. I only wish that there was a larger size.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Baby Yasss Hormel Roast Beef
text: My go-to meal in under 5 minutes. The meat is very juicy and tender. Following the cooking instructions ensures you can't go wrong or make a mistake. You can add any sides for a satisfying meal. Don't just take my word for it—try it and see for yourself. I absolutely love the price, flavor, and appearance.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Tasty, easy dinner or lunch
text: I like these easy microwave dinners. Cook fast. Senior can get 3or 4 lunches/dinners. Usually bake potato and do veggies in microwave to complete dinner. For lunch just hear up the meat and use au jus sandwich on a toasted English muffin. Filling and delicious. If a family is just 1-2 people, one is all you need. You may need 2 packages if family is larger.

title: Great for tacos
text: This Barbacoa is so yummy for lunch or dinner. It's actually really great if you like Barbacoa I would say it makes about eight or nine tacos in this one pack so if you plan to make more definitely by multiple. my family really enjoyed this. You can also add some cilantro and onion to the tacos to make it even better

title: Lazy Man's Brisket
text: For what it is, it tastes great. Obviously it's not going to be as good as a smokehouse brisket or if you know how to make it yourself it will never match it. But for those who need a quick meal this is good enough. Make a sandwich or use it to top a baked potato with some cheese and you have yourself a nice meal. It is a little sweet but i'm not mad about it, just know if you don't like sweet BBQ this might not fit your tastes.

title: Highly recommend
text: Excellent quality beef. Very little fat. And I mean very little. Taste is well balanced with seasoning.i use it for so many things. Snack, fajitas and this time I used it in my chili. I just cut it up into small pieces so much better than using ground beef. More protein and little fat content and that means a lot to me. The convenience is also wonderful.
My husband got really really sick after eating this. Like food poisoning symptoms. It has been a good while since we purchased it but will never buy it again.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: ROAST BEEF IS NOT ONLY FOR SUNDAYS
text: As we age, it is harder to prepare big meals. This product helps when it is just my husband and I having a meal. Although not as pretty as my roasts, it is tasty and is just enough for two. I serve it with mashed potatoes for my husband and baked potato for me with a vegetable of our choosing.

title: DELICIOUS - HIGHLY RECOMMEND
text: This barbacoa beef comes fully cooked in a sealed bag within a heat up container for the microwave. It is literally as delicious as the barbacoa beef used by "Burrito Bowel" restaurants to make the burritoes and burrito bowels. Very happy to have found this product. We also use it to make tacoes. HIGHLY HIGHLY RECOMMEND

title: Tasty once heated
text: While the steak fajitas are fully cooked and can be eaten straight from the bag, I found the water content is really high and you definitely notice the moisture when biting into it cold. On the upside, when you heat it in the oven, it doesn't dry out. I heated 4 oz in a steam oven using the Bake Steam setting at 250°F for 10 minutes, and the result was excellent. It came out hot, juicy, and with a nice fire-grilled flavor. I also like that it does not have a lot of fat.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: So convenient
text: Absolutely the convenient way to make pot roast. The au jus keeps it from drying out. I add a little onion powder, and voila! Seriously, 3 minute prep and cook time for a reasonable pot roast? I wish it was less expensive though, but i guess i wish that about a lot of groceries.

title: Don't Buy It
text: We like the Jack Daniels pulled pork and chicken so I decided to try this. It was a mistake. The meat was so tough that it was as stiff as bacon. It was like trying to chew a leather belt. I spit it out after chewing for about 90 seconds and it literally looked the same as it did on the fork. The rest went in the trash. It was not up to Jack Daniel's usual standard.

title: Great for lazy night
text: The HORMEL SQUARE TABLE Slow Simmered Beef Tips and Gravy, made with beef shoulder cuts and packaged in a 15 oz plastic microwaveable tray, offers a practical solution for those seeking a quick and easy meal. Its refrigerated, not frozen, storage allows it to be kept on hand for an extended period, making it ideal for moments when preparing a full meal feels like too much effort. This product is particularly appealing to carnivores who enjoy meat every now and then. The beef tips are flavorful and filling, making it a reliable choice for satisfying meat cravings without the need for extensive preparation. When the “I don’t wanna cook” feeling strikes, this meal can be quickly prepared by microwaving the beef tips and gravy. Pairing it with a can of warm vegetables and instant mashed potatoes results in a homestyle dinner that is both comforting and convenient. This combination can easily feed two to three people, making it suitable for small households or sharing with a friend.

title: TIRED OF WASTING MY MONEY!
text: For years Beef Tips and Gravy has been my favorite go to meal. It was a staple for me. No more. It has gotten worse over the last year or so. Lots of fat and gristle, more gravy than meat. It does not even resemble the image on the package. Very disappointed. I give up! Not worth the money. So Sad.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I will never buy this product again
text: I used to buy this product for years, however as the prices went up, the quality went down. I recently purchased this product again (hoping to get a "good batch"). However, the quality was so poor, I choose not to even feed it to my dogs. There were arteries in my product...so disappointed.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Small portion and dry meat
text: Easy to prepare, adequate au jus, however the meat was VERY VERY dry.

title: Beyond my expectations!
text: I didn't have the same experience as some of the people who didn't have a favorable opinion. I made the most delicious meal(s) with the Hormel Beef Tips. I cooked some wide egg noodles and heated up the beef tips in the microwave. At the end I made a split decision to add sour cream which turned into a kind of glorified beef stroganoff. My beef tips were flavorful and I found NO fat. The beef tips were the priciest item @ around &10.56 with the sour cream and noodles each under $2. I was able to get three generous portions for around $5 each. Cheaper than McDonald's and much tastier! I would definitely buy them again!

title: Made of waste cuts
text: In the past this was a good product. Last few times its been nasty. every piece is covered in ice and when it does thaw it doesn't even look like steak. Its mostly pieces of fat and unchewable stuff. unfortunately it has went down hill

title: This was not good
text: I wish I never bought this product it looked good in the picture of course opened it up it looked like dog food tasted very salty. And it was just gravy hardly any meat. Lesson learned

title: Some of the best brisket I've ever eaten
text: I have never purchased pre-cooked, prepared Sliced. Brisket before. It just makes me nervous that it would be very dry. I decided to take a chance and purchase this for something a little different. I was beyond pleasantly surprised. This brisket was seasoned to perfection and was so juicy. Honestly, probably some of the best brisket I have ever eaten. My husband loved it, too. I've already added some more to my cart for my next food order. I highly recommend this product. You won't regret it.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I waDidn't really like it much and my 1 year old spit it out
text: I have to admit I was very skeptical at first bc it looked nothing like the package. It looked more like a meatloaf. My 1 yr old didn't like it. After adding my own seasonings to it, it was ok then he ate it.

title: Continuous buyer
text: Convenience is great! Pop it in the air fryer for just a few minutes and it's done. It has excellent flavor however some pieces has a bit of fat on it and I don't care too much for that. The price is a little much at $20 a bag but it's good for my nachos and I keep buying it so it must be worth it. Very flavorful!

title: Great taste
text: Taste great. Just microwaved and served on a bun along with a pickle and sliced onion. Only thing is, it did raise my sugar level a little more than home cooked brisket but ok if you dont have issue watching your glucose. For me it was a splurge meal, you know ok for a treat but not every day meal

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I may or may not purchase again.
text: Taste was very good. However, the amount of meat was disappointing, and the package cover photo is extremely deceiving. In no way is the amount enough for three servings. Please do better Hormel…either add more product or edit the package photo.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Never
text: Amount, taste, texture and tough.

title: Pretty good but....
text: Bought this today for the first time. I sampled it and thought it was tasty but separated it into portions to freeze for later. Then I read the reviews! I did notice the beef was small, lots of gravy and a bit salty but still felt I would enjoy it as a meal over noodles. However after reading the reviews I'm hesitant to try it again because I feel like I got lucky with this package it doesn't seem to be full of fat. So I guess I'm saying you really need to work on quality control based on the reviews. It was especially disheartening to read from reviewers who've purchased it for years and it becomes so disappointed. I purchased your turkey in gravy and thought that was quite good so I had high hopes for this. I think it's going to make a good meal but I'm hesitant to buy it again. .

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: this product was so hot the steam gave me 2nd degree burns
text: just watch out for the bubble of steam

title: Very disappointed with the quality
text: I've been purchasing this at least once a month because it is perfect for a single person. This time, there was so much FAT in the container that made it difficult to consume. Do better Hormel

I love to heat it up in my air fryer with seasoned fries that i have shortened the cooking time by putting the in microwaved about 2 minutes and 30 seconds. Just enough to give them a cooking start so that when i put them into a air fryer there is no under cooked taste and they are crisp. I make little fajitas with red onions and chicken. Easy as pie!!!! 1111

title: stear clear
text: please dont order this yes. it was easy to cook it was an OK amount for the money it was slimy when cooked. it didnt have the consistency of meet. almost like tofu or something lab grown just buy the meat yourself and a 99 seasoning pack. i thought this would save me some time. it probability took the same amount of time as the option listed above

title: My go-to brisket, better than restaurants
text: Sooo good. Very tender. And, get this...you don't need BBQ sauce. That's how you know it's good. I bought this and a big brand name to compare and I didn't even finish the other brand. With this, you can actually taste the smokiness. Some slices have a lot of fat, but I just trim it off. Still worth the money to me. My only complaint is the vacuum-sealed packaging, which doesn't always appear to be completely sealed. They should use a different sealing method to cut down on refunds. Be sure to check your package before cooking bc if it's not sealed, you could be eating meat that's been open for about a month (vacuum-sealed meat has a longer expiration date bc of the seal).

title: I will never buy this product again.
text: This package was more fat and gristle than beef. There is no way that there are 2.5 servings in this package.

The flavor of this product was non-descriptive and bland, almost like cardboard with some gristle. Fajita seasoning is MIA. The packaging touts "NEW LOOK." Well, John Soules Foods, I highly recommend you focus on the flavor instead. After not finishing my "fajita steak" quesadilla, I threw the rest of the package away.

This is the very best ready-to-eat beef on the market. Says the Texas beefeater for many years. Taste is pure honemade quality. Whether you add potatoes (or rice) and a salad, or you use good quality bread or buns, you can serve this with pride and enjoy the free time you have saved.

My only question is why is it expensive 🫰 like everything else? Stop gouging guys, minimum wage is still cheap and probably always will be. Lower the cost to $6 at the most. Otherwise, it tastes great, I made 4 sandwiches with this small amount of product but I guess that's still cheaper than going out to eat. 😞

I always cook in a pan on the stove at about medium heat from the refrigerator, and add some of my own seasonings on them and let it brown on all sides. Taking those extra steps makes it taste really good. Only thing I don’t like is the small portion sizes. A 6oz would only feed one person depending on age and appetite.

title: Not a good value for the money
text: I thought purchasing the frozen precut strips would be better... but there were several strips that were hard, couldn't be chewed because it was rubbery, and just the day. This meat cost too much money to have inedible strips. The taste is good. Just disappointed that several strips I couldn't eat, 1 or 2 maybe although it should be none, but this pack had several.

title: Don't recommend.
text: I don't recommend this product. It is very small pieces. Not much meat. More gristle than meat. Taste isn't good either. Not worth spending money on.

title: It was a great product, now all I taste is salt
text: I stopped buying this when the price went up and the size (of product) went down. It is so hot here, I haven't been using the hot oven...So I bought these as a treat, all I heard was you put too much salt in here... did the lid of the salt fall off??? The meat was tender, but it used to be cubes of beef now it is slabs of meat (like pulled) beef. I am so disappointed.

title: I shouldn't taste this good but it is fantastic!
text: Ready in 5 minutes, tastes great! I usually don't pick these kind of foods but I was running short on time and I'm sick of fast food drive ups. I spent less than half the money for this and some buns and it tasted 10 time better than fast food. This was quick and easy.

The meat was tough on a burritos and fajitas. Some gristle too. I had to fix the problem. I decided to put the meat in my Hot Pot make a boil with water and seasoning. Package came already seasoned well but adding more water thinned out the seasoning it already had on it and now it is delicious and tender. Ready for burritos, fajitas or topped on rice with macaroni, spinach, sweet potatoes mixed with brown sugar.

title: Great for Salads
text: I buy these steak strips to use in my salads and they are great! They smell good, they taste good and all you have to do is put some on a plate, pop it in the microwave and put it in the salad, or whatever else you want to use it for. No seasoning necessary. it tastes really good right out of the bag!

what I disnt like was the bbq sauce, I took mine out ofbit and put sweet baby rays on it. i did give it a overall rating of a 4 due to the bbq sauce and nothing is like fresh smoked brisket :) bit for sfore bought, precooked its a good choice for precooked brisket. so definitely give it a try .

This product is like opening a shoe box and not knowing what's in it. Sometimes the meat is juicy and tender and sometimes you get the hard dry stale end portions. Sometimes you get good amounts, (but for me never for the amount charged), and sometimes not so, and lastly the flavor is the same way, sometimes flavorful and sometimes not so much. This is why I would recommend this product; the fact I love smoked brisket. I wish Walmart would have better selections for us.

title: Except for the chunk of 100% fat
text: enjoyable beef product with pleasant tasting gravy. I added an out sourced serving of mashed potatoes. 15oz package feeds one man.

title: I will never buy Beef Tip and Gravy again!
text: Beef Tips and Gravy has blah taste with what seemed to be more gravy than meat. Will never purchase again.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Super Delicious!
text: This was outstanding! The taste is terrific and we've had this for dinner 3x this week. It tastes so much like my own roast beef. For me it's about taste. And it's yummy! Quick and easy to fix and voila! You end up with a savory meal. Very reasonably priced as well. 😋

title: Not as good as they once were!
text: The price increased and the quality deteriorated. Much less meat in the package and noticing more fat than ever before. Not worth the price anymore.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I would definitely buy this again.
text: We thought this tasted great. It was very tender, not much fat, no gristle. The au jus was savory and not too salty. It was a snap to prepare. Thanks.

title: Quick and Easy Meal
text: This is very easy to prepare. I buy it often. It pairs well with any traditional beef tips meal. I am also carb conscious, so this really fits well.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Would definitely recommend this!
text: Delicious, tender, savory and super easy to prepare! Thank you Hormel for this product! Please don't even consider removing it from the grocery store shelves.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Really good and quick beef n' noodles
text: We make this probably every other week and the whole family loves it. We add it to my favorite gluten free pasta egg noodle, of course after cooking the noodles. Super quick, simple and delicious!

title: Absolutely awful
text: I never write reviews given just how bad this was I couldn't not say anything. Purchased 4 packages to feed 6 people , there was more grizzle and fat . It was inedible we tossed it and ordered pizza

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Found NO Issue With The Roast Beef Nor Turkey
text: A friend gave me two frozen boxes from his freezer (roast and turkery) he buys and didn't want. I had a sick cat who would not eat cat food. I prepared the Roast Beef and he loved it, and I ate some too. Was totally amazed how well cooked, how tasty, and I'm thrilled to add to my grocery list now. Easy to prepare and delicious. Plus, I prefer NO preservatives or artificial additives. I thank Hormel for making my life easier.

title: Not as pictured - Not even close
text: I bought this product to fix a quick meal for two. The cover shows nice pieces of meat and a lot of it with just a little gravy. what I got in the package was a lot of gravy and very few pieces of meat. Shared for two there was just enough for small servings of meat. Hormel needs to change the cover if they continue to put out a product like the one I received. The use by date of the package was 06/10/2025. I will not buy again.

title: I am very disappointed
text: I have had this ten times previously the last two times I had friends over and raved about your product beef tips and gravy, How disappointing the meal was there was so much fat and gristle in both packages barely enough for two people.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: No. Horrible
text: Tastes likes sugar beef. Now full of dextrose. We fed to the possums. Hormel has gone horrible

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Yum.
text: Tried this for the first time. It was honestly as good as the braised beef that I make from an old recipe. Very tender, no fat and great flavor. So easy and fast for a delicious meal. Fed the two of us well. I will definitely buy again!

title: I threw up 11 times after eating this
text: I had it one night, and about 2 hours later I couldn't stop vomiting. I was up until about 4 am.

title: Won't buy this again
text: I have purchased this product previously and the beef was trim and tasted good. This time is was horrible. It had pieces of fat throughout the package. The few pieces of beef were grizzled. Disappointed

title: I will Not buy this again! Too much gristle anymore.
text: What has happened to these dinners? I have purchased these since they came out. Twice now, the package contained 50% gristle. One occasionally I understand, but not more. Quality has disappeared at Hormel.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Absolutely awful!
text: If you took sawdust and put it in a crappy gravy it would be better than this. The beef was terribly overcooked, tasteless, dry and surprisingly tough. It should be easy to batch cook beef at a lower temperature to make enough collagen to produce a tender meat that people would enjoy. This was absolutely inedible. After just a few bites I put it in the garbage. If I had a dog I would not give this to him.

title: Going to another Brand!
text: I've been eating this for 10 years plus. Amount of beef you get has shrunk drastically. Two people would share 15 oz size and enjoy it. Now, really serves ONE person! Package says 3.5 servings per customer. Lie! That is crap! Amount in Package keeps shrinking! Won't buy it anymore, after 15 or so years! Terrible!

title: This was delicious but not 3.5 servings
text: I really enjoyed the flavor and it was easy to make. Cut some French rolls and dumped it in. It was very good but definitely not 3.5 servings.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Salty!
text: I hadn't bought this item in a while, but it was on sale last week (for the previous full price!). I checked the package for visible fat first. I cooked it today and found it very salty. Unhealthy!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Not what it used to be
text: This has been a favorite of mine for over 15 years. The past couple of years I've seen the price go up and the quality go down. There is a lot more fat in the meat now. I've literally bought hundreds of these over the years. Too bad. They have always been a great, quick option.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Full of fat and gristle. Quality is decreasing
text: I regularly purchase this product without an issue. Last package was mostly fed to the dog.

title: I have recommended it to many friend.
text: I've been eating this for Years. I am a professional cook but sometimes you just need a break from cooking. It's great.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: price has gone up but quality and size gone down
text: this was mostly fat and size much smaller than usual

title: Nope
text: The product was full of gross gristle. There was about 1 cup of unusable meat in the package. What would have been a family meal was only 2 servings. Waste of money!

title: I was disappointed with the Hormel beef tips
text: I was disappointed with the Hormel beef tips. After heating, nearly half of my serving was just fat, which was both unpleasant to find on my plate and uncomfortable to encounter while eating. I expected tender, lean meat but found it hard to enjoy with so much gristle. I would not recommend this product for anyone looking for quality beef tips.

title: Not normal
text: I buy Beef tips a lot. We like to have them on Sunday dinner. This time the Beef tips were not good. I got a lot of grisel! It really was not normal! Very disappointing!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I love this!
text: This is the one beef product I buy even though I raise my own beef. It's delicious! I see comments about the fat, but fat ADDS flavor! & It is good for you in moderation. Seriously so good!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I am disappointed…. Hugh fat chunks!
text: This is usually a quick and delicious meal for my family. However, the last couple times I've prepared it, I was very disappointed to find that almost half of the meal was large pieces of fat. I had to prepare two meals to get enough meat for my family. It was a big let down as this is one of my favorite meals that I've bragged about to my friends.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Disappointed all lot of FAT in the package
text: I usually have no problem with this product, but today is different. Most of it was fat, a big chuck of fat which took up most of the portion amount in the package. Where is the quality control?

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I would definitely buy this product again, and again!
text: I keep Hormel Beef Roast Au Jus in my fridge all the time! Combined with mashed potatoes and a vegetable or two makes a nice quick hot meal. My husband really likes them...and my American Bully does too!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Love the product but often has chunks of fat
text: We use this Beef Roast over egg noodles and in a burrito recipe. Several times recently we had big chunks of fat. This past time we had ~2.4 oz of fat chunks. Could have been separated out, IMHO.

title: Many delicious options
text: My family enjoys the Square Table entrees. The beef tips are great over rice, mashed potatoes or pasta. Tonight it was a quick "poutine." Tater tots layered with Hormel beef tips, gravy and cheese and topped with sliced scallions. A quick Saturday evening meal in under 30 minutes. It was delicious!

title: Shorted my by 111grams.
text: I weighed it all on my food scale at home. Box says 3.5 servings at 121 grams. That would be 425g as advertised on the package. Mine only had 312g, sauce included. False advertising.

title: Yes I would buy this again.
text: This is what I get when I am in the mood for rice and gravy. Nice and easy.

title: Closest thing I've found to Mom's beef tips and gravy!
text: Since all of the beef tips and gravy are in one container, dispensing it into the skillet makes it easy to prepare. While I'm waiting on my rice to cook, I put the burner on its lowest setting and place the beef tips and gravy in the skillet to warm up. When the rice is ready the beef tips are nice and hot. Put down some rice, pour the beef tips on it and it makes one heck of a meal.

title: Nasty..
text: I've bought this about 6 or 8 times. The first 4 times it was DELICIOUS! Quick and easy too. The last few times I've bought it, it's been nasty. Always tons of fat and gristle and I'm seeing lots of pieces with arteries/veins! This used to be good cuts of meat and now it looks line they're picking up the leftovers from the slaughterhouse floor. Will NOT be purchasing this anymore. Very disappointed.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Great!
text: We really enjoy this product, always tasty

title: I have bought and enjoyed this twice!
text: The first time over pasta and the second over rice. It makes a nice quick meal for two and leaves a satisfying comfort. It's on my list!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: We buy this regularly!
text: Finding this has been more than helpful; due to health issues, I have some food limitations plus I am very selective - read as picky! The Roast Beef Au Jus is delicious and so easy for me to make an old-fashioned Sunday dinner any day of the week; I simply add mashed potatoes and either corn or some green beans and meal done!

title: Great Taste! Almost as good as homemade!
text: We've been eating Hormel Beef Tips over noodles for years! The only thing I would change is to have more gravy.! Adding 5 ounces of gravy to your package bringing the total to 20 ounces would be awesome! That way you'd hafe plenty of gravy on your noodles!! Please consider this request as it would add little extra cost to the meal!!

title: I Make A Great Dish With Hormel Beef Tips & Gravy
text: This what I make from the package — LONE STAR HASH 1 Hormel Beef Tips & Gravy 15 oz Package 1/2 Yellow Onion (medium-large diced) 3 cups Russet Potato (cubed) 1/2 cup uncooked Large Grain White Rice 20 oz. Beef or Chicken Broth 1 4oz. can chopped Hatch Green Chiles 2 Tbls. Chili Powder (to taste) Lowery's Seasoning Salt to taste In 12 inch covered skillet sweat diced onions in a bit of oil, then add Hormel Beef Tips & Gravy from package, potatoes, rice, beef broth (swish broth in beef tip bowl to get remainder), can of green chiles, chili powder (to taste) and salt to taste. Simmer covered until potatoes and rice are done adding broth as needed. Serve over unsweet corn bread.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Great taste!
text: Love this roast! We eat it with mashed potatoes and it is just enough for the two of us. Tender and the seasonings are just right

title: Not What I Expected
text: Bought the Beef Tips, but after preparing it, realized it was the Meatloaf in the wrong package. It tasted good, but disappointed it was packaged incorrectly.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I buy this square table quite often and will continue to do
text: I have used it over noodles and with side dishes. It's very convenient, I work long hours get home late and like a good meal and this makes that possible with very little effort. I have tried all the varieties except for the meatloaf. But will soon try it also. I have not been dissatisfied with any of them but tend to use this one the most. I'm a roast beef lover and this roast is tender and flavorful. And I can usually get two to three meals off of it. I'm single I live alone and being able to get one more than one meal is very economical to me and saves me a lot of money. Keep making them hope the quality stays the same!

title: Absolutely
text: First time having the Beef Tips and Gravy, was so delicious lots of beef tips gravy was great not salty at all. Made wide noodles poured beef and gravy over noodles. Highly recommend this and will definitely buy again.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: This is absolutely delicious and tender beef that ta
text: This beef is absolutely delicious and it taste like I roasted it for hours in my oven. It's perfectly seasoned and tender and it does not have the off taste of added preservatives. Thanks Hormel!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: If I was only cooking for 2 people yes I would buy again
text: Beef roast au jus and savory sauce was very tasty . BUT there was not 15oz only 13.2 and could not feed 3 people. Would feed 2 …. Nicely with a side.

title: Deceptive description
text: I was counting on this product as a quick meal to feed 3 people. I made a rich gravy to add to the meat and then served it with bread and mashed potatoes, open faced. Unfortunately I was disappointed by the scant portions of meat that this product provided, definitely not 3 portions worth of meat and they were small bits of meat, not hardy enough for a big appetite. A lot of packaging (deceiving) for the price and the small amount of meat it contained. I will not purchase this again and will be wary of purchasing other similar products from Hormel for the price.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I would not buy this product again!
text: I made this Beef Roast for my son and I with a vegi & side for an easy & fast dinner. We each tasted it and the rest thrown away. Waste of money! I would not feed this to a dog. Very tough and odd tasting. They need to do more quality control on their products. Tried calling several times, office is always closed. Put in a statement to get my money back. The turkey and gravy, although salty was not bad.

title: I'm not sure if I will buy this product again
text: I have purchased this product many times and enjoyed it. Add a few sides and it makes a really quick and easy meal. However, the last time I bought this product it was not up to the usual standard. Gravy was almost solid and meat pieces were so tiny they were hard to find. I'm not sure I will buy it again

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I like Hormel Beef Roast Au Jus
text: My wife and I like the simplicity of being able to microwave the meat portion of our dinner. We make mashed potatoes and a vegetable, and in 20 minutes dinner is done! Hormel beef products are very good and worth the money.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Yea I like it
text: Wish it was labeled gluten free for teenage son with celiac.

title: It's on my weekly shopping list!
text: We love this product! It's simply delicious, easy & fast to fix! I just wish it had more gravy!!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I buy quite often.
text: I place the roast in a large pan let heat about 15 minutes on low, then add a can of whole new potatoes and a can of whole carrots. I let it heat for another 20 minutes. It makes a complete quick meal for the two of us. Throw in some dinner rolls an we are all set. Great, quick affordable meal!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Very savory and tender!
text: I will definitely buy this again. So many ways to prepare and serve with side dishes or on a sandwich with cheese, etc. Only complaint is that the one I just bought had a rather large chunk of pure gristle. A little fat is fine for the added flavor, but gristle should absolutely be removed before packaging.

title: I have been buying this product for years. Love it
text: I pour it over noodles. Never had chunks of fat not was gravy salty. People need to read sodium content before buying any product. Would serve to friends anytime.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I purchase this often.
text: I love this. I use it to make beef and noodles. Along with kluski noodles, onion soup mix, packaged gravy. When I make it everyone loves it. Beef is very tender and flavorful.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Purchased last time today. I would not recommend
text: This product used to be good, but ive noticed a slow decline in the quality. The one i purchased today was 75% fat. Not even enough lean meat to feed one person.

title: I love these! Tasty & filling!
text: I keep these in the freezer and then just microwave them for 4-5 minutes. Let them cool for a bit and then remove the plastic cover. I love them with Hawaiian rolls. Sooooo good!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Really good!
text: Great meal with high protein.

title: Disappointed
text: I have bought this in the past but my husband and I are watching weight so we divided the servings and there is 3vof us with 3.5 servings. We could barely get 2 so there was no way we could have split this in 3. I thought this with a couple side would be dinner but ended up making 2 dinners.

title: Too much fat
text: Tried for the first time, sounded great...but unfortuntaley so much fat in it. Nothing worse than taking 2 first bites and just getting only gross fat. Pretty disappointed for the price.

title: Tasted good
text: I would like a member of quality to contact me

title: Gone down hill for awhile but this is ridiculous....
text: I've been buying these for years and eat at least 4 a month so i can say they've gone downhill with confidence. This time though is crazy. Literally a quarter of the meat was chunks of fat. gross. sad

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Former family fav
text: I agree with a few of these reviews. This used to be a go to and now I find myself buying it less and less. Fatty meat seems to be the standard

title: I hesitate about buying this item again
text: This item had a lot of grizel

title: I would not and will not ever buy this again.
text: We use to buy the 15 oz beef tips with gravy and it was fantastic but a few weeks ago we decided to get another one for a quick fix. BAD MISTAKE the meat was 75 % Fat and tasted like a metal pot. Left a bad taste in our mouths. Figured it was just a fluke because it had always been so good so I bought another one this time I got a family tray. Again full of fat and the gravy was so salty that it burnt our tongues, it was just gross. It was not edible at all, I put it down for our dogs to eat and they smelt of it and walked off. One of them started to hike his leg on it. Now it's pretty bad when dogs won't eat it.

title: Always buy Hormel products.
text: I just made beef tips and noodles with this product, delicious. I also use this when making my stew. Great taste and makes cooking so much easier. Get plenty of compliments on both dishes. Thanks for this tasty beef. Tonya

title: This dish is almost like grandma's.
text: I don't know how you did it, but all that flavor and gravy with 3grams of carbs... bravo. I'm on a keto diet, I'm an over the road trucker and have discovered my new favorite meal. Thanks Hormel.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: VERY DISAPPOINTED
text: I have been purchasing your product for sometime now and as a single mother trying to stretch my few dollars on groceries I am very disappointed more and more because the amount of gristle that is in the beef roast is NOW in each packet. It was not like this before I am now rethinking purchasing your product...

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: NOT GOOD
text: This looked so good, but was not. Weird spice used and was not as tender as it should have been. Will not buy again.

title: Horrible!!!
text: This was nasty. Half the product was chunks of fat. The meat that was there was super tough and overloaded with super salty gravy. Completely disappointed!!! Wow! Nasty was supposed to be disgu***ng but it wouldn't let me post it! Clearly they don't want honest reviews!!!

title: I want to stock up on this item
text: I loved this meal over mashed potatoes. Can I freeze the package to stock up with?

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: It's changed
text: Previously; this was worth the cost. The roast was extremely delish and tender. We loved it and bought it often. The last three times it had less roast beef and lots of fat ! There never used to be any fatty pieces. I'm sad because we really enjoyed this , and it was a staple at our house. But now I don't know if I should; or will continue to buy this. I surely would if it went back to being a delicious , tender, fat free tray of roast beef.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Best roast beef
text: It says to cook in microwave or stove top. I put in the oven with their au gratin potatoes. So good! Perfect texture and taste.

title: Tasty and quick
text: Can't beat this food for a quick meal. Goes great with potatoes. Fast and delicious!

title: Looked like cat food
text: I cooked the product as instructed. The result looked more like cat food - see picture.

title: Veru disappointed
text: The meat is fatty, gristly and the gravy is disgustingly salty, I've been buying this for 10yrs, the last two times i bought it, it was inedible.

title: Aweful cheap meat
text: Today I bought for the first time beef tips from Hormel from the refrigerator sektion of my grocery store. When I think about beef tips I habe sirloin tips in mind. When I opened the package after heading it it was one big blob if meat, no onecould identifizieren that it was beef tips. The consistancy and smell was the one of cheap cafeteria pot roasting. And unfortunately it tasted even worst. If Reminiszenz me of dog food, but the sodium is much to high to actually feed it to a non human I am so disgusted with these so called beef tips that I through them straight into the trash and enjoyed the sides I had fixed with it. Do not buy, it's aweful.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Our favourite!
text: My family has enjoyed this product for many years. It's definitely one of our favourites for an easy lunch or dinner. I like how simple and quick it is to make, unlike products which need to be baked or grilled for quite a long time. It also has a fresh, delicious taste so I prefer it over other brands. Roast beef with au jus makes a great Sunday roast or anytime meal. I use leftovers for shredded beef tacos although honestly there's not usually much left. I find the portion sizes are great for 2-3 adults or a family of 4. The sauce is the most fought-over part as everyone loves it over the meat and also potatoes. Pair with baked potato or canned veg for a really easy meal. Love it and buy it frequently!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I will definitely buy this again.
text: It's lean and tastes homemade.

title: Really, really good!
text: My husband (a picky eater) and I had dinner at our daughter's house tonight. She fixed this with egg noodles for her and me, and mashed potatoes for her dad. We all loved it! The meat is so tender and tasty, the gravy is good and there's not too much of it, and my husband cleaned his plate! Will definitely be buying this again!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I will continue buying this product
text: This product has great flavor, and more than enough for 3 people to enjoy.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: This Beef roast is to die for!
text: This beef roast tastes just like my mothers. I was so surprised it tasted this good. I will continue to buy it and tell everyone I know how fantastic it tastes.

title: HAS SOY!
text: My husband is very allergic to soy and was sick for days... It is not on the label! Hormel is lucky he doesn't go into anaphylactic shock with his allergy. FIX the LABEL

title: I buy this a lot...great start to some simple meals.
text: 3 favorite ways--1) served over rice or noodles with a side veggie; 2) simple hash with refrigerated diced potatoes & onions; 3) quick Farmer's Casserole with refrigerated mashed potatoes & canned veggies

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: I would buy this product again
text: I tried this for the first time and I was so surprised at how good it was. I am buying more tonight from my favorite grocery store.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: This is my favorite Hormel entree of this type.
text: This is my favorite Hormel entree of this type. I love to make sandwiches with it or serve it with mashed potatoes and vegetables so then you can use all the great tasting gravy!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Love it
text: When we stay in our AZ vacation home, I always buy this product. Wish we could get it in Vancouver, BC, Canada.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: People were fighting for the leftovers
text: Really good and really easy to make! Beef is so expensive these days, I appreciate a smaller amount for a lower price.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Tastes different. Don't care for it
text: I used to love this product! Then, all of a sudden, I couldn't find it anywhere. Once it cane back on store shelves, the flavor was off. I did not like it. I hope they change it back to the old recipe.

title: It's ok but expensive for what you get
text: Picture us very decieving. Lots of gravy that's salty. The meat is tender but does not look like the packaging. Dies not serve 4or 5 people. Maybe enough meat for 2 or 3 with small servings. Will probably buy again because it is quick, but only to feed 2 people.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: No
text: I've bought this for years, however the one I just bought was about 1/4 fat. They have lost me as a customer for these.

title: Where's the beef?
text: I purchased this product recently at the suggestion of a friend. The picture on the package shows a large amount of beef with a small amount of gravy. I was very surprised when I served this and discovered the small amount of beef and large amount of extremely salty gravy. Very deceptive packaging! The taste of the beef was fine and I did not encounter lumps of fat like some reviewers.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: another awesome item!
text: this is great with all beef recipes! you can make tacos and tostados add tomato onion cayanne pepper lime and or lemon even a sandwich with hamburger bun so many ways to make this! yum!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: this is so awesome!
text: i love this! very good with vegetables added mainly brussel sprouts tender and full of flavor!

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Disappointed in quality of beef.
text: Purchased the roast beef several times in the past. However, the latest package the meat was tough and difficult to chew. Don't think I'll be buying this again.

product: Slow Simmered Beef Roast Au Jus
title: Started out as a great product - but went downhill
text: When this product (and the chicken) came out, I thought it was great. But now it's nothing but fat. My family doesn't eat fatty meat. This image is all I was all that was edible out of a package.

title: Very disappointed in product.
text: I have used this product for years and always had good flavor and meat was good. I bought another package like before and was very disappointed. Sauce was watered down and meat was mostly fat. Not sure that this will remain a staple in my kitchen.
